landing.subtitle: Warbixin dhijitaal ah oo 5 daqiiqo gudahood. OCR caalami, QR code la wadaago, PDF adduunka si degdeg.

cta.from: CHF/€ 4.90 laga bilaabo · Caalami la aqbali karo

steps.title: Scan dukumiintadaada
steps.desc: Sawir ka qaad ruqsaddaada iyo kaardhka caymiska. OCR si toos ah u shaqeeyaa.

steps.title: La wadaag QR code
steps.desc: Darawalka kale scan QR garees. Xulasho waqtiga dhabta ah oo la wadaago.

steps.title: Buuxi foomka
steps.desc: Foomka caalamiga ah ee OCR uga buuxinaya. Xaqiiji oo tilmaan xaaladaha.

steps.title: Goobaha xadeynta
steps.desc: Riix 18-zone ee sawirka si aad u tilmaanto xadeynta.

steps.title: Saxeex oo dir
steps.desc: Laba saxeex dhijitaal ah. PDF xaqiijisan si degdeg ah.

features.title: Waxa aad u baahan tahay oo dhan

list.title: OCR caalami
list.desc: Claude Vision waxay aqrisaa dukumiintadaada 50+ luqadood. Gelin gacmeed majirto.

list.title: Ilaa 5 baabuur
list.desc: Shil oo leh 3, 4 ama 5 darawal? Darawalka kastaa scan gareeya QR-kiisa.

list.title: Sawirrada goobta
list.desc: 5 qeybood: goob, xadeyn A, xadeyn B, dhaawac, dukumiinto. Oo dhan PDF waxaa lagu dara.

list.title: Sawir xor ah
list.desc: Sawir meesha baabuurta, fallaadhooyinka xagga. PNG waxaa PDF lagu dara.

list.title: Sawirka xadeynta
list.desc: 700+ nooc. 18 zone oo la riixin karo xadeynta.

list.title: Saxeexyo badan
list.desc: N saxeex dhijitaal ah. Sharci ahaan waxtareed 150+ wadan.

list.title: PDF 150+ wadan
list.desc: Dukumiint dhijitaal ah oo buuxda. Shirkadaha caymiska oo dhan way aqbalaan.

list.title: Qaybta Booliska (dhawaan)
list.desc: Booliska QR iyagoo xulashada ku biiraya. Warbixin booliska dhijitaal.

list.title: 50 luqadood + RTL
list.desc: 5 bilyan oo hadla. Carabi, Cibraani, Faarisi RTL. Lambarka degdegga caalamiga.

legal.title: Heerka caalamiga ah
legal.text: PDF dhijitaalka ah ee boom.contact waxaa aqbalay shirkadaha caymiska 50+ wadan.

location.injury_desc_label: Sharaxaad (qayb jidh, xanuun, dhaawac la arko)
location.injury_footer: Dhaawac culus hadduu jiro wac 112 (EU) ama 144 (CH).

cgu.consent_marketing: Waxaan u oggolaanayaa PEP's Swiss SA inay emailkayga u isticmaalaan adeegyada dheeraadka. <opt>Ikhtiyaari — waqtiga kasta la joojin karaa.</opt>
cgu.error_network: Khalad network. Dib u isku day.

cgu_sections.title: 1. Ujeeddada
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact waa adeeg dhijitaal ah oo ay samaysay PEP's Swiss SA. Waxay kaalmeysaa diyaarinta warbixinta shilka dhijitaalka caalamiga ah.

cgu_sections.title: 2. Aqbalitaanka
cgu_sections.text: Isticmaalka adeegga waxaa micnihiisu yahay aqbalitaanka shuruudaha. Isticmaal sharci darro ah waa mamnuuc.

cgu_sections.title: 3. Adeegyada
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact waxay bixisaa: (a) OCR; (b) Session QR; (c) Saxeexyo dhijitaal; (d) PDF email. Darawalku mas'uul u yahay inuu shirkadda caymiskiisa u soo warbixiyo.

cgu_sections.title: 4. Qiimaha
cgu_sections.text: Adeegga waxaa lagu iibinayaa xidmooyin. Lacag bixinta Stripe (PCI-DSS). Credits-ku waxay leeyihiin taariikhda dhamaadka.

cgu_sections.title: 5. Qiimaha sharci
cgu_sections.text: PDF-ka boom.contact waxaa aqbalay shirkadaha caymiska. PEP's Swiss SA kuma dammaanad qaabanayso aqbalitaanka dhammaan wadamada.

cgu_sections.title: 6. Mas'uuliyadda
cgu_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA kama qaadato mas'uuliyadda khaladaadka OCR ama diidmada caymis. Mas'uuliyadda waxay ku xaddidan tahay lacagta la bixiyay.

cgu_sections.title: 7. Milkiilaha
cgu_sections.text: Software, calaamadaha, waxyaabaha boom.contact waa hantida PEP's Swiss SA.

cgu_sections.title: 8. Sharciga
cgu_sections.text: Sharciga Swiss ayaa dhaqan gala. Muran Maxkamadda Jura ayaa xaliya.

privacy_sections.title: Mas'uulka xogta
privacy_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA, Bellevue 7, 2950 Courgenay, Jura, Suisse. privacy@boom.contact

privacy_sections.title: Xogta la uruuriyay
privacy_sections.text: Email, magac, ciwaanka, lambarka gaarka, GPS, saxeexa dhijitaalka, macluumaadka caymiska.

privacy_sections.title: Aasaaska sharci
privacy_sections.text: Fulinta heshiiska (Art. 6.1.b RGPD) xogta warbixinta. Ogolaanshaha isticmaalka ganacsiga.

privacy_sections.title: Mudada kaydinta
privacy_sections.text: Sessions: 2 saacadood. PDF iyo xog: 30 maalmood ka dibna la tirtiraa. Xogta lacag bixinta: 10 sano.

privacy_sections.title: La wadaagida xogta
privacy_sections.text: Xogta kuma iibsan partida saddexaad. Stripe, Resend, Anthropic adeegyada kaliya ayay u isticmaalaan.

privacy_sections.title: Xuquuqdaada
privacy_sections.text: Fiirin, wax ka beddel, tirtir, wareejin. U qor privacy@boom.contact.

pricing.title: Dooro xidmada
pricing.subtitle: Hore u iibso credits — hal mar ku bixin

pricing.legal:
Iibsashada, waxaad aqbalaysaa shuruudaha boom.contact.
Soo noqod ma jirto PDF la sameeyay kaddib.
